subcodes.title: Words to the president of the university, spoken on 1912-05-23
subcodes.first_line: I am very pleased with you and delighted to see your university. You are, indeed, serving the world of humanity and expending your life for mankind
subcodes.first_line_orig: من از شما بسیار راضی هستم و از دارالفنون شما خیلی خوشنود فی الحقیقه خدمت بعالم انسانی مینمائی و بنوع بشر جانفشانی
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
